categories.name: Core
categories.description: Foundational skills that bootstrap the skill-spark workspace itself: universal skill search and the skill-spark CLI companion skill.

categories.name: DevOps
categories.description: 开发工作流相关的 AI Agent Skill 集合。

categories.name: Meta Skills
categories.description: Skills about skills — authoring, scaffolding, evaluating, and managing other skills.

categories.name: SDLC
categories.description: Software development lifecycle skills, organized by domain (frontend, backend, etc.).

subcategories.name: Frontend
subcategories.description: Frontend development skills: Next.js or TanStack Router + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.

categories.name: Knowledge
categories.description: Skills that distill public figures' mental models, decision heuristics, and communication DNA into runnable AI skills.

categories.name: Shared
categories.description: Cross-cutting skills reused across categories and apps: skill search and app scaffolding.
